title: The Judicious Jubilant Jay
content:
The Judicious Jubilant Jay,
    who did up her Back Hair every morning with a Wreath of Roses,
    Three feathers, and a Gold Pin.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Judicious Jubilant Jay"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
